input: I received order 1234 but the headphones are defective. Can I get a refund? What's the policy?
output:
I'm sorry to hear that your wireless headphones from order 1234 are defective. I've processed a refund for $79.99 to your original payment method. You should see it reflected in your account within 3-5 business days.

Our policy states that most items can be returned within 30 days with a receipt.

tool_calls.name: check_policy
tool_calls.result: {"category": "headphones", "policy": "Most items can be returned within 30 days with a receipt. Final sale items are non-refundable."}

tool_calls.name: process_refund
tool_calls.result: {"refund_id": "REF-1234-001", "order_id": "1234", "amount": 79.99, "status": "approved", "message": "Refund of $79.99 approved. You will see it in 3\u20135 business days."}
